subject: max number of frames with K3 data?
body:
Hi all,

I'm new to Warp.  Is it correct that Warp currently uses just a single
GPU for motion correction?  If so, I presume VRAM would be the
limiting factor in determining the upper limit of what could be
processed.

Any hope for processing a 120 frame micrograph from a K3?  Which GPU
might work?  Here's a sample:
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1W5iOSnbufo9gHGqwGH13WuqQqzJpHXHD?usp=sharing

Matt
